title: Ghana Independence Day
description: Ghana marks its 1957 independence with public celebrations, music, food, and reflection on national history.

title: Nigerian Independence Day
description: Nigeria commemorates independence in 1960 through community gatherings, cultural performances, and shared food.

title: Pysanky Season
description: Pysanky are Ukrainian eggs decorated with symbolic patterns using a wax-resist method, traditionally made around Easter.

title: Indian Independence Day
description: India commemorates independence in 1947 with flag ceremonies, cultural programs, music, and community gatherings.

title: Mexican Independence Day
description: Mexico celebrates the beginning of its independence movement with el Grito, music, regional foods, and public festivities.

title: Brazilian Independence Day
description: Brazil commemorates independence in 1822 with civic events, music, food, and community celebrations.

title: National Day of China
description: National Day commemorates the founding of the People's Republic of China in 1949 and is commonly marked by gatherings and festivities.

title: National Liberation Day of Korea
description: Gwangbokjeol commemorates Korea's liberation in 1945 and is observed by Korean communities in both South and North Korea.
